questionHtml: Comment on the specific energies of hydrogen and methane.
markschemeHtml:
« 141.6 55.5 » hydrogen/H2 produces 2.6 times/more than twice the energy of methane/CH4 «per mass/g»

OR

less mass of hydrogen/H2 required «to produce same amount of energy»

OR

hydrogen/H2 more energy efficient ✔

 

Accept “hydrogen/H2 produces «nearly» three times more energy than methane/CH4 «per mass/g»”.

meta.title: Comment on the specific energies of hydrogen and methane.
